description_long: This object is a wristwatch with a round face and a robust, slightly bulky case, likely designed for durability. The watch features a prominent circular dial, encased in a thick bezel, with two distinct lugs on either side for attaching the strap. The strap appears to be a continuous band, possibly made of rubber or silicone, with a smooth, slightly arched profile and a solid, integrated construction. The side view reveals a raised crown or button on the right side of the case, suggesting functionality for time adjustment. The underside of the watch is flat, indicating comfort for wrist placement, and the overall design is utilitarian, suitable for everyday urban wear. The watch lacks visible decorative elements, focusing on practicality and resilience.
description: A robust, round-faced wristwatch with a thick case and a smooth, arched strap, designed for durability and everyday use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular watch face and thick bezel, with lugs for the strap visible at the top and bottom.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arched strap and the raised crown or button on the right side of the case.
description_view_2: Profile view displaying the thickness of the case and the flat underside, with the strap extending downward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuous, smooth strap and the overall streamlined profile.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is plain and circular, with no visible numerals, indices, or decorative elements, suggesting a minimalist or utilitarian style.
attribute_strap_type: Integrated rubber or silicone strap with a continuous, arched design and no visible stitching or links.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with a single circular face; no visible hands, digits, or complications are discernible.
